changeSet.author: eqms
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO roles (name, description, is_system, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('ADMIN', 'System administrator', true, 0, now(), now()), ('QA_MANAGER', 'Quality assurance manager', true, 0, now(), now()), ('REVIEWER', 'Reviews regulated records', true, 0, now(), now()), ('AUTHOR', 'Authors regulated records', true, 0, now(), now()), ('OPERATOR', 'Operational user', true, 0, now(), now());

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM roles WHERE name IN ('ADMIN','QA_MANAGER','REVIEWER','AUTHOR','OPERATOR');

changeSet.author: eqms
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (code, description, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('DOCUMENT_CREATE', 'Create documents', 0, now(), now()), ('DOCUMENT_REVIEW', 'Review documents', 0, now(), now()), ('DOCUMENT_APPROVE', 'Approve documents', 0, now(), now()), ('DOCUMENT_OBSOLETE', 'Obsolete documents', 0, now(), now()), ('CHANGE_CREATE', 'Create change controls', 0, now(), now()), ('CHANGE_APPROVE', 'Approve change controls', 0, now(), now()), ('AUDIT_VIEW', 'View the audit trail', 0, now(), now()), ('USER_MANAGE', 'Manage users and roles', 0, now(), now());

changeSet.author: eqms
changeSet.comment: Assign permissions to roles. ADMIN gets everything; others get a least-privilege subset.

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM role_permissions WHERE role_id IN (SELECT id FROM roles WHERE name IN ('ADMIN','QA_MANAGER','REVIEWER','AUTHOR','OPERATOR'));
